notes: Model-identification for mistral-vibe: the model NAME (distinct from the context-window bar). Single no-op turn elicits the model; SessionMetrics.ModelName must be the launched model (mistral-medium-3.5), not 'unknown'. The daemon reads it from the meta.json sidecar (config.active_model) via applySidecar on every event; NormalizeModelName leaves mistral ids intact. This is essentially the basic-turn arc; the model assertion is the observations.model exact-match, evidenced after turn_end. Single-birth adapter (session id = the session_<...> transcript directory, sessionIDFromPath), modeled like claudecode/kiro-cli — birth anchored to start, unpinned. Tokens observable (sidecar stats.context_tokens → turn_done TokenSnapshot); cost is NOT (parser never reads stats.session_cost; mistral-vibe absent from core/pkg/capacity). Model mistral-medium-3.5 confirmed from live config.active_model. PROVISIONAL on emission: whether a proc-<PID> presession row precedes the session_<...> birth is not source-confirmable — record settles it. Recipe needs wait_turn, which the scaffolded driver stubs (driver=gap:wait_turn); record ports SEAM 2 before driving. BACKFLOW (re-spec): mistral-vibe is a presession adapter — birth re-templated as presession_birth->session_birth(new_session) from the codex sibling (a transient proc-<PID> row is born ready before the real session_<id> transcript dir appears, then reconciles under a DIFFERENT session_id); every post-birth phase pins same_session_as session_birth. OBSERVATIONS: the offline replay golden cannot reproduce vibe's meta.json sidecar (model + tokens are sidecar-only, read live), so model and tokens are UNVERIFIABLE offline — like kiro-cli the observation vector asserts neither model nor tokens (agent only, cost_nonzero=false, tokens_nonzero=false).

text: proc-<PID> pre-session appears in ready within 1s of launch (PID bound before the transcript dir exists)
Real session_<id> reconciles (different session_id) when the transcript directory appears, born ready
vibe PID bound to the real session (matched by cwd)
Turn completes back to ready (model name read live from meta.json sidecar, unverifiable in the offline golden)
